creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
It looks like I inadvertently upgraded rsync to 3.2.3 on the fbs-pkgm-ctl jail on pkg-master.nyi.freebsd.org.  This version has an issue causing it to hang forever when it reaches the configured --time-limit, rather than exiting.

I have installed the known-working version of rsync we use on the mirrors on pkg-master now.

This is the same issue as reported in #249359.
